raw_consumer_statement: I was traveling abroad in XXXX caught a taxi service from a parking lot next to the resort on XX/XX/XXXX The guy tried running my credit card for XXXX several times said it wasn't going through he said so I paid {$90.00} cash no receipts were given for declined transaction or cash payment he barely spoke English... and the other taxi driver took me to my location When I noticed the transactions totaling {$250.00} on my credit card statement on the XXXX of XXXX I contacted American Express the moment I got home they refused to reverse the transaction I reached out to the better Business bureau their corporate office called me and told me no that they were valid transactions that they were not going to reverse them that they had receipts which they don't The company name the only thing that's showing on those receipts XXXX something or other is not a legitimate business or name or anything I've done diligent research and could not locate any business or company related to taxi service or credit card transactions with that business name American Express is only providing the transaction receipts that come through on their end they have no actual information for this company in XXXX
